Untitled Project
GHOST Evidence Selection and Condensation Requirements
Document
  • VIEWS
  • Document
  • Table
  • Traceability
  • Deep Traceability

    • GHOST Evidence Selection and Condensation Requirements

    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-SELECTION-CONDENSATION
    VERSION: 0.1

    1. 1. Purpose and Scope

    STATEMENT: This document defines semantic document-evidence selection through A3 and document-evidence condensation through A4.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT
    1.1. Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SRS-FILE-TREE Requirement File Tree Parent Anchor
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-PRODUCT-NAME Product and Package Naming Boundary
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-KM-PARENT Evidence Processing Knowledge Management Parent
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-TWO-STAGE A3/A4 Functional Decomposition
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-BOUNDARY Evidence Boundary
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AGENT-STACK Agent Stack Reference
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-JSON Evidence Configuration Target
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-NO-FABRICATION No Fabricated Evidence Result
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CODE-OWNERSHIP Evidence Code Ownership
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-SIBLING Sibling Ownership Boundary
    STATEMENT: GHOST shall classify retrieved document candidates for usefulness, retain a bounded useful subset, organize selected evidence into thematic classes, condense it into internal document context, and write the result into SuperPrompt.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-PRODUCT-NAME
    1.2. Product and Package Naming Boundary
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-PRODUCT-NAME
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    STATEMENT: The product described by this document shall be named GHOST; current Python paths may remain under ragstream.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-KM-PARENT
    1.3. Evidence Processing Knowledge Management Parent
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-KM-PARENT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    STATEMENT: Evidence Selection and Condensation shall be governed by the capability boundaries, shared artifacts, configuration governance, and sibling ownership defined in 40_knowledge_management.sdoc.

    This document shall refine A3/A4 behavior without redefining document ingestion, retrieval/reranking, or Memory Management.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-TWO-STAGE
    1.4. A3/A4 Functional Decomposition
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-TWO-STAGE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    STATEMENT: Evidence processing shall contain:
    1. A3 usefulness classification and deterministic useful-only selection.
    2. A4 thematic organization, budget selection, and final document-context condensation.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-BOUNDARY
    1.5. Evidence Boundary
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-BOUNDARY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    STATEMENT: This document shall not own document ingestion, dense/sparse retrieval scoring, ColBERT reranking, memory-context synthesis, or final user-answer generation.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AGENT-STACK
    1.6. Agent Stack Reference
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AGENT-STACK
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    STATEMENT: A3 and A4 shall consume AgentPrompt and LLMClient according to 20_agent_stack.sdoc while this document owns their concrete functional behavior and deterministic safeguards.

    2. 2. A3 Candidate Input and Preconditions

    STATEMENT: A3 is a document-chunk usefulness classifier after retrieval or reranking.
    GHOST-A3-ROOT
    2.1. A3 Usefulness Gate
    UID: GHOST-A3-ROOT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-NOT-PROMPT-GATE A3 Scope Exclusions
    • GHOST-A3-SOURCE-RERANK Preferred Candidate Source
    • GHOST-A3-SOURCE-RETRIEVAL Retrieval Candidate Fallback
    • GHOST-A3-NO-CANDIDATES No-Candidate Failure
    • GHOST-A3-CANDIDATE-CAP A3 Candidate Cap
    • GHOST-A3-HYDRATED Hydrated Candidate Dependency
    • GHOST-A3-PROMPT A3 Prompt Under Evaluation
    • GHOST-A3-LOCAL-IDS A3 Local Identifier Mapping
    • GHOST-A3-SANITIZE A3 Structural Sanitization
    • GHOST-A3-REQUIRED-OUTPUT A3 Required Output Shape
    • GHOST-A3-CONFIG A3 Agent Configuration
    • GHOST-A3-FULL-LOG-OFF A3 Full Logging Default
    • GHOST-A3-MAP A3 Local-to-Real Mapping
    • GHOST-A3-ORDER-PRESERVE A3 Candidate Order Preservation
    • GHOST-A3-STATUS-DISCARDED Discarded Stage Status
    • GHOST-A3-STATUS-NONDISCARD Useful and Borderline Stage Status
    • GHOST-A3-USEFUL-ONLY Useful-Only Final Selection
    • GHOST-A3-NO-SELECTION-BAND No Current Selection Band
    • GHOST-A3-NO-DUPLICATE-LABEL No Duplicate Classification
    • GHOST-A3-VIEW A3 Stage View
    • GHOST-A3-DECISIONS A3 Decision Diagnostics
    • GHOST-A3-SELECTED-EXTRAS A3 Selected Diagnostics
    • GHOST-A3-STAGE A3 Lifecycle
    • GHOST-A3-PROMPT-READY A3 Prompt Reprojection
    • GHOST-A3-PUBLIC-LOG A3 Public Summary
    • GHOST-A3-INTERNAL-LOG A3 Internal Decisions
    • GHOST-A3-NO-CHUNK-MUTATION A3 Chunk Integrity
    STATEMENT: A3 shall classify each bounded document candidate as useful, borderline, or discarded relative to the current request-under-evaluation.
    GHOST-A3-NOT-PROMPT-GATE
    2.2. A3 Scope Exclusions
    UID: GHOST-A3-NOT-PROMPT-GATE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A3 shall not act as a prompt-validity gate, garbage detector, retrieval replacement, memory merge, or final answer generator.
    GHOST-A3-SOURCE-RERANK
    2.3. Preferred Candidate Source
    UID: GHOST-A3-SOURCE-RERANK
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A3 shall read candidates from sp.views_by_stage["reranked"] when that view is non-empty.
    GHOST-A3-SOURCE-RETRIEVAL
    2.4. Retrieval Candidate Fallback
    UID: GHOST-A3-SOURCE-RETRIEVAL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: When the reranked view is empty, A3 shall read candidates from sp.views_by_stage["retrieval"].
    GHOST-A3-NO-CANDIDATES
    2.5. No-Candidate Failure
    UID: GHOST-A3-NO-CANDIDATES
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: When neither reranked nor retrieval candidates exist, A3 shall log the missing-candidate condition and raise an explicit runtime failure.
    GHOST-A3-CANDIDATE-CAP
    2.6. A3 Candidate Cap
    UID: GHOST-A3-CANDIDATE-CAP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A3 shall process no more than the effective max_candidates value from the selected candidate view; the current constructor baseline shall be 30.
    GHOST-A3-HYDRATED
    2.7. Hydrated Candidate Dependency
    UID: GHOST-A3-HYDRATED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-SKIP-MISSING-CHUNK Missing Hydrated Chunk Handling
    • GHOST-A3-EVIDENCE-NONEMPTY Evidence Block Requirement
    STATEMENT: Every candidate shown to the A3 model shall map to a hydrated chunk in sp.base_context_chunks.
    GHOST-A3-SKIP-MISSING-CHUNK
    2.8. Missing Hydrated Chunk Handling
    UID: GHOST-A3-SKIP-MISSING-CHUNK
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-HYDRATED Hydrated Candidate Dependency
    STATEMENT: A candidate row without a corresponding hydrated chunk shall be omitted from the evidence block and local-id mapping.
    GHOST-A3-EVIDENCE-NONEMPTY
    2.9. Evidence Block Requirement
    UID: GHOST-A3-EVIDENCE-NONEMPTY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-HYDRATED Hydrated Candidate Dependency
    STATEMENT: A3 shall fail explicitly when no evidence text can be built from the selected candidate rows.

    3. 3. A3 Prompt Construction and Identifier Isolation

    STATEMENT: A3 exposes compact local identifiers and sanitized text to the model.
    GHOST-A3-PROMPT
    3.1. A3 Prompt Under Evaluation
    UID: GHOST-A3-PROMPT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-PROMPT-CONTINUITY ActiveBrief-Aware A3 Prompt
    STATEMENT: A3 shall construct the request-under-evaluation from the central SuperPrompt projector rather than from raw GUI text.
    GHOST-A3-PROMPT-CONTINUITY
    3.2. ActiveBrief-Aware A3 Prompt
    UID: GHOST-A3-PROMPT-CONTINUITY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-PROMPT A3 Prompt Under Evaluation
    STATEMENT: The A3 request-under-evaluation shall include current TASK/PURPOSE/CONTEXT and only the ActiveBrief continuity material permitted by the finalized relation policy.
    GHOST-A3-LOCAL-IDS
    3.3. A3 Local Identifier Mapping
    UID: GHOST-A3-LOCAL-IDS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-NO-REAL-ID Real Identifier Isolation
    • GHOST-A3-EVIDENCE-ORDER A3 Evidence Order
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-LOCAL-IDS AC: Local Identifier Isolation
    STATEMENT: A3 shall assign one-based local chunk identifiers to model-visible evidence and shall maintain a private local-to-real identifier mapping.
    GHOST-A3-NO-REAL-ID
    3.4. Real Identifier Isolation
    UID: GHOST-A3-NO-REAL-ID
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-LOCAL-IDS A3 Local Identifier Mapping
    STATEMENT: A3 shall not require the LLM to reproduce long canonical chunk identifiers.
    GHOST-A3-EVIDENCE-ORDER
    3.5. A3 Evidence Order
    UID: GHOST-A3-EVIDENCE-ORDER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-LOCAL-IDS A3 Local Identifier Mapping
    STATEMENT: Model-visible evidence chunks shall preserve the selected candidate order and shall include the local identifier and rank.
    GHOST-A3-SANITIZE
    3.6. A3 Structural Sanitization
    UID: GHOST-A3-SANITIZE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-SANITIZE-MEANING Sanitization Meaning Preservation
    STATEMENT: A3 shall sanitize line-start Markdown headings, code fences, and horizontal-rule markers inside chunk text so source content cannot compete with the outer prompt structure.
    GHOST-A3-SANITIZE-MEANING
    3.7. Sanitization Meaning Preservation
    UID: GHOST-A3-SANITIZE-MEANING
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-SANITIZE A3 Structural Sanitization
    STATEMENT: A3 sanitization shall replace only structure-forming line-start markers and shall otherwise preserve the chunk meaning and text.
    GHOST-A3-REQUIRED-OUTPUT
    3.8. A3 Required Output Shape
    UID: GHOST-A3-REQUIRED-OUTPUT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-OUTPUT-LABELS A3 Allowed Labels
    STATEMENT: A3 shall request exactly one item_decisions object containing one local chunk_id and one usefulness_label for every model-visible candidate.
    GHOST-A3-OUTPUT-LABELS
    3.9. A3 Allowed Labels
    UID: GHOST-A3-OUTPUT-LABELS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-REQUIRED-OUTPUT A3 Required Output Shape
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-INVALID-LABEL Invalid Label Fallback
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A3-LABELS AC: A3 Labels
    STATEMENT: The only accepted A3 usefulness labels shall be useful, borderline, and discarded.

    4. 4. A3 Agent Configuration and LLM Invocation

    STATEMENT: A3 uses ordinary AgentFactory resolution and the Responses API.
    GHOST-A3-CONFIG
    4.1. A3 Agent Configuration
    UID: GHOST-A3-CONFIG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-CONFIG-JSON A3 JSON Contract
    • GHOST-A3-MODEL-SETTINGS A3 Model Settings Authority
    • GHOST-A3-COMPOSE A3 Prompt Composition
    • GHOST-A3-RESPONSES A3 Provider Path
    • GHOST-A3-PARSE A3 Structured Parse
    STATEMENT: The current A3 agent shall be resolved through AgentFactory using agent_id a3_nli_gate and version 002 unless an approved version is explicitly selected.
    GHOST-A3-CONFIG-JSON
    4.2. A3 JSON Contract
    UID: GHOST-A3-CONFIG-JSON
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-CONFIG A3 Agent Configuration
    STATEMENT: A3 model settings, static prompt instructions, dynamic bindings, decision target, and output schema shall be defined in its JSON configuration and external label catalog.
    GHOST-A3-MODEL-SETTINGS
    4.3. A3 Model Settings Authority
    UID: GHOST-A3-MODEL-SETTINGS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-CONFIG A3 Agent Configuration
    STATEMENT: A3 shall use the model name and maximum output tokens from the resolved AgentPrompt configuration rather than hard-coding them in A3 run logic.
    GHOST-A3-COMPOSE
    4.4. A3 Prompt Composition
    UID: GHOST-A3-COMPOSE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-CONFIG A3 Agent Configuration
    STATEMENT: A3 shall pass request-under-evaluation, evidence chunks, and required-output text to AgentPrompt.compose.
    GHOST-A3-RESPONSES
    4.5. A3 Provider Path
    UID: GHOST-A3-RESPONSES
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-CONFIG A3 Agent Configuration
    STATEMENT: A3 shall invoke LLMClient.responses with minimal reasoning effort and a stable agent/version cache key.
    GHOST-A3-PARSE
    4.6. A3 Structured Parse
    UID: GHOST-A3-PARSE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-CONFIG A3 Agent Configuration
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-PARSE-FAIL A3 Parse Failure
    STATEMENT: A3 shall parse the provider result through AgentPrompt according to the configured item root, item identifier, and usefulness enum.
    GHOST-A3-FULL-LOG-OFF
    4.7. A3 Full Logging Default
    UID: GHOST-A3-FULL-LOG-OFF
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: Full A3 model input and raw output logging shall remain disabled in normal mode and shall execute only under an explicit developer-debug switch.
    GHOST-A3-PARSE-FAIL
    4.8. A3 Parse Failure
    UID: GHOST-A3-PARSE-FAIL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-PARSE A3 Structured Parse
    STATEMENT: A3 parse failure shall be logged with latency context and shall be raised rather than converted into fabricated successful decisions.

    5. 5. A3 Deterministic Decision Mapping and Selection

    STATEMENT: Python maps local results to real identifiers and owns final selection.
    GHOST-A3-MAP
    5.1. A3 Local-to-Real Mapping
    UID: GHOST-A3-MAP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-IGNORE-UNKNOWN-ID Unknown Local Identifier
    STATEMENT: A parsed item shall affect a real chunk only when its local chunk_id exists in the current local-to-real mapping.
    GHOST-A3-IGNORE-UNKNOWN-ID
    5.2. Unknown Local Identifier
    UID: GHOST-A3-IGNORE-UNKNOWN-ID
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-MAP A3 Local-to-Real Mapping
    STATEMENT: A parsed item with missing or unknown local chunk identifier shall not create a decision for any real chunk.
    GHOST-A3-INVALID-LABEL
    5.3. Invalid Label Fallback
    UID: GHOST-A3-INVALID-LABEL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-OUTPUT-LABELS A3 Allowed Labels
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-MISSING-DECISION Missing Decision Fallback
    STATEMENT: A missing or invalid usefulness label shall be normalized to borderline.
    GHOST-A3-MISSING-DECISION
    5.4. Missing Decision Fallback
    UID: GHOST-A3-MISSING-DECISION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-INVALID-LABEL Invalid Label Fallback
    STATEMENT: A candidate without a valid mapped model decision shall be represented as borderline in the ordered A3 decision map.
    GHOST-A3-ORDER-PRESERVE
    5.5. A3 Candidate Order Preservation
    UID: GHOST-A3-ORDER-PRESERVE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A3 shall preserve the incoming candidate order in its stage view and decision map regardless of returned item order.
    GHOST-A3-STATUS-DISCARDED
    5.6. Discarded Stage Status
    UID: GHOST-A3-STATUS-DISCARDED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A candidate labeled discarded shall receive A3ChunkStatus.DISCARDED in the A3 stage view.
    GHOST-A3-STATUS-NONDISCARD
    5.7. Useful and Borderline Stage Status
    UID: GHOST-A3-STATUS-NONDISCARD
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: Candidates labeled useful or borderline shall receive A3ChunkStatus.SELECTED in the complete A3 stage view, while final_selection_ids shall still contain useful candidates only.
    GHOST-A3-USEFUL-ONLY
    5.8. Useful-Only Final Selection
    UID: GHOST-A3-USEFUL-ONLY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A3-MAX-USEFUL Maximum Useful Limit
    • GHOST-A3-NO-MIN No Minimum Useful Quota
    • GHOST-A3-NO-BORDERLINE-PROMOTION No Borderline Promotion
    • GHOST-A3-ZERO-USEFUL Zero Useful Result
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A3-SELECT AC: A3 Useful-Only Selection
    STATEMENT: A3 final_selection_ids shall contain useful identifiers only, in incoming candidate order.
    GHOST-A3-MAX-USEFUL
    5.9. Maximum Useful Limit
    UID: GHOST-A3-MAX-USEFUL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-USEFUL-ONLY Useful-Only Final Selection
    STATEMENT: A3 shall truncate the ordered useful identifier list to the effective useful_hard_max; the current baseline shall be 12.
    GHOST-A3-NO-MIN
    5.10. No Minimum Useful Quota
    UID: GHOST-A3-NO-MIN
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-USEFUL-ONLY Useful-Only Final Selection
    STATEMENT: A3 shall not force a minimum useful count and the current forced minimum shall be zero.
    GHOST-A3-NO-BORDERLINE-PROMOTION
    5.11. No Borderline Promotion
    UID: GHOST-A3-NO-BORDERLINE-PROMOTION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-USEFUL-ONLY Useful-Only Final Selection
    STATEMENT: A3 shall not promote borderline candidates into final_selection_ids to satisfy a quota.
    GHOST-A3-ZERO-USEFUL
    5.12. Zero Useful Result
    UID: GHOST-A3-ZERO-USEFUL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-USEFUL-ONLY Useful-Only Final Selection
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A3-ZERO AC: A3 Zero Useful
    STATEMENT: A3 may validly produce an empty final_selection_ids list when no candidate is labeled useful.
    GHOST-A3-NO-SELECTION-BAND
    5.13. No Current Selection Band
    UID: GHOST-A3-NO-SELECTION-BAND
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: The current A3 contract shall not contain a global selection_band and shall remove stale a3_selection_band data when reusing a SuperPrompt.
    GHOST-A3-NO-DUPLICATE-LABEL
    5.14. No Duplicate Classification
    UID: GHOST-A3-NO-DUPLICATE-LABEL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: The current A3 output contract shall not include duplicate markers, canonical duplicate references, or duplicate-removal decisions.

    6. 6. A3 SuperPrompt Write-Back and Observability

    STATEMENT: A3 writes complete decisions and the useful-only working subset.
    GHOST-A3-VIEW
    6.1. A3 Stage View
    UID: GHOST-A3-VIEW
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: sp.views_by_stage["a3"] shall contain every processed candidate in original order with inherited stage score and A3 status.
    GHOST-A3-DECISIONS
    6.2. A3 Decision Diagnostics
    UID: GHOST-A3-DECISIONS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: sp.extras["a3_item_decisions"] shall map each processed real chunk identifier to local identifier, rank, and normalized usefulness label.
    GHOST-A3-SELECTED-EXTRAS
    6.3. A3 Selected Diagnostics
    UID: GHOST-A3-SELECTED-EXTRAS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A3 extras shall expose selected identifiers, candidate source, candidate count, parse status, maximum useful limit, and zero forced minimum.
    GHOST-A3-STAGE
    6.4. A3 Lifecycle
    UID: GHOST-A3-STAGE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: After successful A3 write-back, sp.stage shall equal a3 and history_of_stages shall receive a3.
    GHOST-A3-PROMPT-READY
    6.5. A3 Prompt Reprojection
    UID: GHOST-A3-PROMPT-READY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A3 shall rebuild prompt_ready through the central SuperPrompt composition path after stage write-back.
    GHOST-A3-PUBLIC-LOG
    6.6. A3 Public Summary
    UID: GHOST-A3-PUBLIC-LOG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A3 shall log a compact public summary including candidate, useful, borderline, discarded, selected, max-useful, model, and latency values.
    GHOST-A3-INTERNAL-LOG
    6.7. A3 Internal Decisions
    UID: GHOST-A3-INTERNAL-LOG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A3 may log per-chunk decisions and selected identifiers at internal visibility without exposing them as public GUI messages by default.
    GHOST-A3-NO-CHUNK-MUTATION
    6.8. A3 Chunk Integrity
    UID: GHOST-A3-NO-CHUNK-MUTATION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ROOT A3 Usefulness Gate
    STATEMENT: A3 shall not mutate Chunk snippets, sources, spans, or persistent metadata; it shall change only stage views, selection identifiers, diagnostics, lifecycle, and prompt projection.

    7. 7. A4 Preconditions and Empty-Selection Safety

    STATEMENT: A4 consumes only A3-useful hydrated document chunks.
    GHOST-A4-ROOT
    7.1. A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    UID: GHOST-A4-ROOT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-PRECONDITION A4 Useful-Chunk Precondition
    • GHOST-A4-CANDIDATE-CAP A4 Candidate Cap
    • GHOST-A4-JSON-PATHS Exact A4 JSON Paths
    • GHOST-A4-SEQUENCE A4 Seven-Step Sequence
    • GHOST-A4-SELECT A4 Useful Selection
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASER Chunk Phraser Call
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER Chunk Classifier Call
    • GHOST-A4-GROUPS Class Group Construction
    • GHOST-A4-TOKEN-LIMIT Effective A4 Output Limit
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-TRIGGER Fallback No-Grouping Trigger
    • GHOST-A4-FINAL Final Condenser Call
    • GHOST-A4-CACHE Shared A4 Prompt Cache Key
    • GHOST-A4-RESPONSES A4 Provider Path
    • GHOST-A4-USAGE-LOG A4 Usage Logging
    • GHOST-A4-PARSE A4 Structured Parse
    • GHOST-A4-WRITE-SCTX S_CTX_MD Write-Back
    • GHOST-A4-WRITE-IDS A4 Final Selection IDs
    • GHOST-A4-VIEW A4 Stage View
    • GHOST-A4-STAGE A4 Lifecycle
    • GHOST-A4-EXTRAS A4 Diagnostics
    • GHOST-A4-PROMPT-READY A4 Prompt Reprojection
    • GHOST-A4-PROJECTOR Condensed Evidence Rendering
    • GHOST-A4-NO-MEMORY A4 Memory Boundary
    • GHOST-A4-NO-FINAL-ANSWER A4 Final-Answer Boundary
    STATEMENT: A4 shall transform the bounded A3-useful document subset into one condensed internal document-context artifact.
    GHOST-A4-PRECONDITION
    7.2. A4 Useful-Chunk Precondition
    UID: GHOST-A4-PRECONDITION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-EMPTY A4 Empty-Selection Finalization
    STATEMENT: A4 shall inspect the bounded A3 stage rows, A3 item decisions, and base_context_chunks to determine whether at least one useful hydrated chunk exists.
    GHOST-A4-CANDIDATE-CAP
    7.3. A4 Candidate Cap
    UID: GHOST-A4-CANDIDATE-CAP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: A4 shall inspect no more than the effective max_candidates value; the current constructor baseline shall be 30.
    GHOST-A4-EMPTY
    7.4. A4 Empty-Selection Finalization
    UID: GHOST-A4-EMPTY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-PRECONDITION A4 Useful-Chunk Precondition
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-EMPTY-SCTX Empty S_CTX_MD
    • GHOST-A4-EMPTY-VIEW Empty A4 Stage View
    • GHOST-A4-EMPTY-DIAG Empty A4 Diagnostics
    • GHOST-A4-EMPTY-STAGE Empty A4 Lifecycle
    STATEMENT: When A3 provides zero useful hydrated chunks, A4 shall complete a controlled empty-selection state without loading A4 agent JSONs or calling an LLM.
    GHOST-A4-EMPTY-SCTX
    7.5. Empty S_CTX_MD
    UID: GHOST-A4-EMPTY-SCTX
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-EMPTY A4 Empty-Selection Finalization
    STATEMENT: A4 empty-selection finalization shall set S_CTX_MD to an empty string and final_selection_ids to an empty list.
    GHOST-A4-EMPTY-VIEW
    7.6. Empty A4 Stage View
    UID: GHOST-A4-EMPTY-VIEW
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-EMPTY A4 Empty-Selection Finalization
    STATEMENT: A4 empty-selection finalization shall create an a4 stage view that marks the available A3 rows discarded with zero score.
    GHOST-A4-EMPTY-DIAG
    7.7. Empty A4 Diagnostics
    UID: GHOST-A4-EMPTY-DIAG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-EMPTY A4 Empty-Selection Finalization
    STATEMENT: A4 empty-selection finalization shall record skipped status, skip reason, empty-selection budget profile, empty classes/groups, and zero effective output-token limit.
    GHOST-A4-EMPTY-STAGE
    7.8. Empty A4 Lifecycle
    UID: GHOST-A4-EMPTY-STAGE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-EMPTY A4 Empty-Selection Finalization
    STATEMENT: A4 empty-selection finalization shall set stage a4, append a4 history, and recompose prompt_ready.

    8. 8. A4 Configuration Loading and Seven-Step Workflow

    STATEMENT: The current A4 implementation is a fixed three-AgentPrompt workflow with deterministic steps between calls.
    GHOST-A4-JSON-PATHS
    8.1. Exact A4 JSON Paths
    UID: GHOST-A4-JSON-PATHS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-JSON-EXISTS A4 Configuration Existence
    • GHOST-A4-JSON-VALID A4 Configuration Parse
    • GHOST-A4-FRESH-PROMPTS Fresh A4 AgentPrompts
    STATEMENT: A4Condenser shall resolve the exact current JSON paths:
    - data/agents/a4_condenser/chunk_phraser/a4_1_001.json;
    - data/agents/a4_condenser/chunk_classifier/a4_2_001.json;
    - data/agents/a4_condenser/final_condenser/a4_3_001.json.
    GHOST-A4-JSON-EXISTS
    8.2. A4 Configuration Existence
    UID: GHOST-A4-JSON-EXISTS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-JSON-PATHS Exact A4 JSON Paths
    STATEMENT: A4 shall fail explicitly when any required A4 JSON file is missing.
    GHOST-A4-JSON-VALID
    8.3. A4 Configuration Parse
    UID: GHOST-A4-JSON-VALID
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-JSON-PATHS Exact A4 JSON Paths
    STATEMENT: A4 shall fail explicitly when a required A4 JSON file cannot be read or parsed.
    GHOST-A4-FRESH-PROMPTS
    8.4. Fresh A4 AgentPrompts
    UID: GHOST-A4-FRESH-PROMPTS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-JSON-PATHS Exact A4 JSON Paths
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-RUN-LOCAL-MUTATION Run-Local Classifier Mutation
    STATEMENT: A4 shall construct fresh AgentPrompt objects from all three exact configurations at the beginning of each non-empty run.
    GHOST-A4-RUN-LOCAL-MUTATION
    8.5. Run-Local Classifier Mutation
    UID: GHOST-A4-RUN-LOCAL-MUTATION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FRESH-PROMPTS Fresh A4 AgentPrompts
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-OPTIONS Run-Local Classifier Options
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-DEFAULT Run-Local Classifier Default
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-LIGHT Classifier Prompt Simplification
    STATEMENT: A4 classifier option mutation shall apply only to the fresh classifier AgentPrompt for the current A4 run and shall not modify a shared factory-cached prompt.
    GHOST-A4-SEQUENCE
    8.6. A4 Seven-Step Sequence
    UID: GHOST-A4-SEQUENCE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-HELPER A4 LLM Helper Boundary
    • GHOST-A4-DET-BOUNDARY A4 Deterministic Helper Boundary
    STATEMENT: A4 shall execute in this order:
    1. deterministic selected-chunk preparation;
    2. Chunk Phraser call;
    3. deterministic active-class validation and classifier restriction;
    4. Chunk Classifier call;
    5. deterministic regrouping and budget preparation;
    6. Final Condenser call;
    7. deterministic SuperPrompt write-back.
    GHOST-A4-HELPER
    8.7. A4 LLM Helper Boundary
    UID: GHOST-A4-HELPER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-SEQUENCE A4 Seven-Step Sequence
    STATEMENT: A4LLMHelper shall own shared A4 message composition, provider invocation, provider metadata logging, and AgentPrompt parsing for the three calls.
    GHOST-A4-DET-BOUNDARY
    8.8. A4 Deterministic Helper Boundary
    UID: GHOST-A4-DET-BOUNDARY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-SEQUENCE A4 Seven-Step Sequence
    STATEMENT: A4 deterministic helpers shall own chunk selection, local identifiers, sanitization, class validation, class mapping, grouping, budget profile, fallback package, and final write-back.

    9. 9. A4 Selected-Chunk Preparation

    STATEMENT: A4 creates a new local evidence set from A3 useful decisions.
    GHOST-A4-SELECT
    9.1. A4 Useful Selection
    UID: GHOST-A4-SELECT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-ORDER A4 Evidence Order
    • GHOST-A4-LOCAL-IDS A4 Local Identifiers
    • GHOST-A4-SOURCE A4 Evidence Provenance
    • GHOST-A4-SANITIZE A4 Structural Sanitization
    • GHOST-A4-NO-SELECTED No Useful Preparation Failure
    • GHOST-A4-PROMPT-EVAL A4 Request Under Evaluation
    • GHOST-A4-EVIDENCE-BLOCK A4 Evidence Block
    STATEMENT: A4 selected-chunk preparation shall retain only A3 rows whose a3_item_decisions usefulness_label equals useful and whose real identifier maps to a hydrated chunk.
    GHOST-A4-ORDER
    9.2. A4 Evidence Order
    UID: GHOST-A4-ORDER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-SELECT A4 Useful Selection
    STATEMENT: A4 shall preserve A3 row order for the retained useful chunks.
    GHOST-A4-LOCAL-IDS
    9.3. A4 Local Identifiers
    UID: GHOST-A4-LOCAL-IDS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-SELECT A4 Useful Selection
    STATEMENT: A4 shall assign fresh contiguous local identifiers 1..N to retained chunks and maintain local-to-real and real-to-local mappings.
    GHOST-A4-SOURCE
    9.4. A4 Evidence Provenance
    UID: GHOST-A4-SOURCE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-SELECT A4 Useful Selection
    STATEMENT: Each A4 selected item shall retain its real identifier, A3 rank, source path, sanitized snippet, and hydrated chunk object.
    GHOST-A4-SANITIZE
    9.5. A4 Structural Sanitization
    UID: GHOST-A4-SANITIZE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-SELECT A4 Useful Selection
    STATEMENT: A4 shall replace line-start Markdown headings, code fences, and horizontal rules inside prompt-visible snippets with non-structural markers.
    GHOST-A4-NO-SELECTED
    9.6. No Useful Preparation Failure
    UID: GHOST-A4-NO-SELECTED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-SELECT A4 Useful Selection
    STATEMENT: The normal selected-chunk preparation helper shall fail explicitly when invoked without A3 rows or without any useful hydrated chunk; the outer A4 precheck shall normally route this case to empty-selection safety.
    GHOST-A4-PROMPT-EVAL
    9.7. A4 Request Under Evaluation
    UID: GHOST-A4-PROMPT-EVAL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-SELECT A4 Useful Selection
    STATEMENT: A4 shall build its request-under-evaluation from available purpose, task, and context values and shall fail when all are empty.
    GHOST-A4-EVIDENCE-BLOCK
    9.8. A4 Evidence Block
    UID: GHOST-A4-EVIDENCE-BLOCK
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-SELECT A4 Useful Selection
    STATEMENT: A4 shall build one ordered evidence block containing local identifier, A3 rank, source, and sanitized chunk text for each selected item.

    10. 10. A4 Chunk Phraser and Active Class Validation

    STATEMENT: The first A4 model call proposes a bounded ordered thematic class set.
    GHOST-A4-PHRASER
    10.1. Chunk Phraser Call
    UID: GHOST-A4-PHRASER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASER-OUTPUT Chunk Phraser Output
    • GHOST-A4-CLASS-COUNT Active Class Count
    • GHOST-A4-CLASS-IDS Allowed Internal Class IDs
    • GHOST-A4-CLASS-FIELDS Non-Empty Class Fields
    • GHOST-A4-NO-CLASS No Valid Class Failure
    • GHOST-A4-CLASS-ORDER Class Priority Order
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASE-MAP Phrase-to-ID Mapping
    STATEMENT: The Chunk Phraser shall receive the current request-under-evaluation and selected evidence block.
    GHOST-A4-PHRASER-OUTPUT
    10.2. Chunk Phraser Output
    UID: GHOST-A4-PHRASER-OUTPUT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASER Chunk Phraser Call
    STATEMENT: The Chunk Phraser shall return class_definitions containing class_id, class_phrase, and class_context_text.
    GHOST-A4-CLASS-COUNT
    10.3. Active Class Count
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASS-COUNT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASER Chunk Phraser Call
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-CLASSES AC: A4 Active Classes
    STATEMENT: The A4 phraser contract shall permit one to four active classes.
    GHOST-A4-CLASS-IDS
    10.4. Allowed Internal Class IDs
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASS-IDS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASER Chunk Phraser Call
    STATEMENT: Deterministic validation shall accept only internal class identifiers ID1, ID2, ID3, and ID4.
    GHOST-A4-CLASS-FIELDS
    10.5. Non-Empty Class Fields
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASS-FIELDS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASER Chunk Phraser Call
    STATEMENT: A valid active class shall contain a non-empty class phrase and non-empty class context text.
    GHOST-A4-NO-CLASS
    10.6. No Valid Class Failure
    UID: GHOST-A4-NO-CLASS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASER Chunk Phraser Call
    STATEMENT: A4 shall fail explicitly when the phraser returns no valid active class.
    GHOST-A4-CLASS-ORDER
    10.7. Class Priority Order
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASS-ORDER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASER Chunk Phraser Call
    STATEMENT: The order of validated active classes shall define their priority rank for later grouping and budget selection.
    GHOST-A4-PHRASE-MAP
    10.8. Phrase-to-ID Mapping
    UID: GHOST-A4-PHRASE-MAP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-PHRASER Chunk Phraser Call
    STATEMENT: Deterministic processing shall build exact and normalized phrase-to-internal-ID mappings for the current active classes.
    GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-OPTIONS
    10.9. Run-Local Classifier Options
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-OPTIONS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-RUN-LOCAL-MUTATION Run-Local Classifier Mutation
    STATEMENT: The fresh classifier AgentPrompt shall be restricted to the active class phrases for the current run, with exactly one class selection per item.
    GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-DEFAULT
    10.10. Run-Local Classifier Default
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-DEFAULT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-RUN-LOCAL-MUTATION Run-Local Classifier Mutation
    STATEMENT: The fresh classifier AgentPrompt default may be set to the first active class phrase for the current run.
    GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-LIGHT
    10.11. Classifier Prompt Simplification
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-LIGHT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-RUN-LOCAL-MUTATION Run-Local Classifier Mutation
    STATEMENT: After run-local enum preparation, the generic classifier decision-target block may be suppressed to reduce repeated prompt content while preserving parse enums.

    11. 11. A4 Chunk Classifier and Deterministic Mapping

    STATEMENT: The second A4 call assigns every selected local chunk to one visible active class phrase.
    GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER
    11.1. Chunk Classifier Call
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-OUTPUT Chunk Classifier Output
    • GHOST-A4-CLASS-RESOLVE Classifier Class Resolution
    • GHOST-A4-IGNORE-INVALID Invalid Class Decision
    • GHOST-A4-ASSIGN-COMPLETE Complete Assignment Requirement
    • GHOST-A4-NO-MULTI-CLASS Single Class per Chunk
    STATEMENT: The Chunk Classifier shall receive the current request, selected evidence block, and active class definitions.
    GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-OUTPUT
    11.2. Chunk Classifier Output
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER-OUTPUT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER Chunk Classifier Call
    STATEMENT: The classifier shall return item_decisions containing local chunk_id and one class_id value represented by an active class phrase or a supported legacy active internal ID.
    GHOST-A4-CLASS-RESOLVE
    11.3. Classifier Class Resolution
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASS-RESOLVE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER Chunk Classifier Call
    STATEMENT: Deterministic processing shall resolve classifier values by exact active internal ID, exact active phrase, or normalized active phrase.
    GHOST-A4-IGNORE-INVALID
    11.4. Invalid Class Decision
    UID: GHOST-A4-IGNORE-INVALID
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER Chunk Classifier Call
    STATEMENT: A classifier item with missing local identifier, missing class value, or unresolved class value shall not become a valid assignment.
    GHOST-A4-ASSIGN-COMPLETE
    11.5. Complete Assignment Requirement
    UID: GHOST-A4-ASSIGN-COMPLETE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER Chunk Classifier Call
    STATEMENT: Normal grouped mode shall require a valid class assignment for every selected local chunk.
    GHOST-A4-NO-MULTI-CLASS
    11.6. Single Class per Chunk
    UID: GHOST-A4-NO-MULTI-CLASS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-CLASSIFIER Chunk Classifier Call
    STATEMENT: Each selected local chunk shall belong to exactly one active class in normal grouped mode.

    12. 12. A4 Grouping, Budget Profiles, and Fallback

    STATEMENT: Deterministic processing groups assigned chunks in class-priority order and selects groups according to output allowance.
    GHOST-A4-GROUPS
    12.1. Class Group Construction
    UID: GHOST-A4-GROUPS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-NONEMPTY-GROUPS Non-Empty Group Selection
    • GHOST-A4-BUDGET-IDS Budget-Retained Real Identifiers
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-GROUP AC: A4 Complete Grouping
    STATEMENT: A4 shall construct one group per active class in active-class priority order and shall append assigned selected items to the corresponding group in original evidence order.
    GHOST-A4-NONEMPTY-GROUPS
    12.2. Non-Empty Group Selection
    UID: GHOST-A4-NONEMPTY-GROUPS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-GROUPS Class Group Construction
    STATEMENT: Normal grouped mode shall discard empty class groups before budget selection.
    GHOST-A4-TOKEN-LIMIT
    12.3. Effective A4 Output Limit
    UID: GHOST-A4-TOKEN-LIMIT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-TIGHT Tight Budget Profile
    • GHOST-A4-NARROW Narrow Budget Profile
    • GHOST-A4-MEDIUM Medium Budget Profile
    • GHOST-A4-BROAD Broad Budget Profile
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-BUDGET AC: A4 Budget Profiles
    STATEMENT: A4 shall use the caller-supplied positive effective_output_token_limit or the configured/default A4 output allowance when none is supplied or the deterministic package receives a non-positive value.
    GHOST-A4-TIGHT
    12.4. Tight Budget Profile
    UID: GHOST-A4-TIGHT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-TOKEN-LIMIT Effective A4 Output Limit
    STATEMENT: When the effective output limit is below 1200 tokens, A4 shall retain at most the highest-priority non-empty class group and mark the profile tight.
    GHOST-A4-NARROW
    12.5. Narrow Budget Profile
    UID: GHOST-A4-NARROW
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-TOKEN-LIMIT Effective A4 Output Limit
    STATEMENT: When the effective output limit is at least 1200 and below 1800 tokens, A4 shall retain at most the two highest-priority non-empty groups and mark the profile narrow.
    GHOST-A4-MEDIUM
    12.6. Medium Budget Profile
    UID: GHOST-A4-MEDIUM
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-TOKEN-LIMIT Effective A4 Output Limit
    STATEMENT: When the effective output limit is at least 1800 and below 2600 tokens, A4 shall retain at most the three highest-priority non-empty groups and mark the profile medium.
    GHOST-A4-BROAD
    12.7. Broad Budget Profile
    UID: GHOST-A4-BROAD
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-TOKEN-LIMIT Effective A4 Output Limit
    STATEMENT: When the effective output limit is at least 2600 tokens, A4 shall retain all non-empty groups and mark the profile broad.
    GHOST-A4-BUDGET-IDS
    12.8. Budget-Retained Real Identifiers
    UID: GHOST-A4-BUDGET-IDS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-GROUPS Class Group Construction
    STATEMENT: The ordered final document identifiers for normal A4 condensation shall be the real chunk identifiers belonging to retained groups in group-priority and item order.
    GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-TRIGGER
    12.9. Fallback No-Grouping Trigger
    UID: GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-TRIGGER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-CONTINUE Fallback Continuation
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-EVIDENCE Fallback Evidence Preservation
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-LENSES Fallback Class Overview
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-DIAG Fallback Observability
    STATEMENT: A4 shall enter fallback_no_grouping when classifier output is missing, incomplete, unusable, references an inactive class, leaves a selected chunk unassigned, or produces only empty groups.
    GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-CONTINUE
    12.10. Fallback Continuation
    UID: GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-CONTINUE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-TRIGGER Fallback No-Grouping Trigger
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-FALLBACK AC: A4 Fallback
    STATEMENT: Fallback no-grouping shall continue to Final Condenser rather than failing the A4 run.
    GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-EVIDENCE
    12.11. Fallback Evidence Preservation
    UID: GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-EVIDENCE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-TRIGGER Fallback No-Grouping Trigger
    STATEMENT: Fallback no-grouping shall retain all selected useful chunks in their current order and shall not assume per-chunk class assignments.
    GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-LENSES
    12.12. Fallback Class Overview
    UID: GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-LENSES
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-TRIGGER Fallback No-Grouping Trigger
    STATEMENT: Fallback no-grouping shall provide the active class phrases and contexts only as collective high-level lenses over the full selected evidence set.
    GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-DIAG
    12.13. Fallback Observability
    UID: GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-DIAG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-TRIGGER Fallback No-Grouping Trigger
    STATEMENT: Fallback no-grouping shall be marked by budget profile and warning diagnostics and shall not insert an error message into S_CTX_MD.

    13. 13. A4 Final Condenser

    STATEMENT: The third A4 call produces one evidence-loyal internal document context block.
    GHOST-A4-FINAL
    13.1. Final Condenser Call
    UID: GHOST-A4-FINAL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-FINAL-OUTPUT Final Condenser Output
    • GHOST-A4-INTERNAL-CONTEXT Internal Context Nature
    • GHOST-A4-EVIDENCE-LOYAL Evidence Loyalty
    • GHOST-A4-CLASS-PRIORITY Class Priority Compression
    • GHOST-A4-NO-INTRO-CONCLUSION No Decorative Framing
    • GHOST-A4-TOKEN-GUIDANCE Output Allowance Guidance
    STATEMENT: The Final Condenser shall receive request-under-evaluation, selected evidence, class-group package, decision targets, and required output shape.
    GHOST-A4-FINAL-OUTPUT
    13.2. Final Condenser Output
    UID: GHOST-A4-FINAL-OUTPUT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FINAL Final Condenser Call
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-A4-NONEMPTY-SCTX Non-Empty Final Context
    STATEMENT: The Final Condenser shall return exactly the configured s_ctx_md text field through structured JSON.
    GHOST-A4-INTERNAL-CONTEXT
    13.3. Internal Context Nature
    UID: GHOST-A4-INTERNAL-CONTEXT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FINAL Final Condenser Call
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-CONTEXT AC: A4 Internal Context
    STATEMENT: s_ctx_md shall be neutral internal supporting context and shall not address the user, answer the current task, or imitate a final response.
    GHOST-A4-EVIDENCE-LOYAL
    13.4. Evidence Loyalty
    UID: GHOST-A4-EVIDENCE-LOYAL
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FINAL Final Condenser Call
    STATEMENT: The final condenser shall stay close to the selected chunks, remove repetition and formatting noise, and shall not invent facts, requirements, recommendations, examples, or outside knowledge.
    GHOST-A4-CLASS-PRIORITY
    13.5. Class Priority Compression
    UID: GHOST-A4-CLASS-PRIORITY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FINAL Final Condenser Call
    STATEMENT: When compression is necessary, the final condenser shall preserve higher-priority class content before lower-priority class content.
    GHOST-A4-NO-INTRO-CONCLUSION
    13.6. No Decorative Framing
    UID: GHOST-A4-NO-INTRO-CONCLUSION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FINAL Final Condenser Call
    STATEMENT: The final condenser shall not add an introduction, conclusion, motivational framing, evaluation, or decorative essay structure.
    GHOST-A4-TOKEN-GUIDANCE
    13.7. Output Allowance Guidance
    UID: GHOST-A4-TOKEN-GUIDANCE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FINAL Final Condenser Call
    STATEMENT: The required-output text shall instruct the final condenser to keep s_ctx_md at or below approximately the effective output-token allowance.
    GHOST-A4-CACHE
    13.8. Shared A4 Prompt Cache Key
    UID: GHOST-A4-CACHE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: All three A4 provider calls shall use the stable prompt cache key a4_condenser_shared_prefix.
    GHOST-A4-RESPONSES
    13.9. A4 Provider Path
    UID: GHOST-A4-RESPONSES
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: A4LLMHelper shall use LLMClient.responses with minimal reasoning effort and metadata return enabled.
    GHOST-A4-USAGE-LOG
    13.10. A4 Usage Logging
    UID: GHOST-A4-USAGE-LOG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: A4LLMHelper shall log available model, status, input, cached-input, uncached-input, output, reasoning-token, and incomplete-reason data for each A4 call.
    GHOST-A4-PARSE
    13.11. A4 Structured Parse
    UID: GHOST-A4-PARSE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: Each A4 call result shall be parsed by its fresh AgentPrompt before deterministic downstream processing.

    14. 14. A4 SuperPrompt Write-Back and Rendering

    STATEMENT: Final deterministic processing writes the condensed document context and retained identifiers.
    GHOST-A4-NONEMPTY-SCTX
    14.1. Non-Empty Final Context
    UID: GHOST-A4-NONEMPTY-SCTX
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FINAL-OUTPUT Final Condenser Output
    STATEMENT: Normal A4 finalization shall fail explicitly when the Final Condenser returns empty s_ctx_md.
    GHOST-A4-WRITE-SCTX
    14.2. S_CTX_MD Write-Back
    UID: GHOST-A4-WRITE-SCTX
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: Normal A4 finalization shall write the parsed s_ctx_md into sp.S_CTX_MD.
    GHOST-A4-WRITE-IDS
    14.3. A4 Final Selection IDs
    UID: GHOST-A4-WRITE-IDS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: sp.final_selection_ids shall equal selected_real_ids_after_budget in deterministic order.
    GHOST-A4-VIEW
    14.4. A4 Stage View
    UID: GHOST-A4-VIEW
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: sp.views_by_stage["a4"] shall include the ordered union of budget-retained identifiers and prior final-selection identifiers, marking retained identifiers SELECTED with descending synthetic rank scores and others DISCARDED with zero score.
    GHOST-A4-STAGE
    14.5. A4 Lifecycle
    UID: GHOST-A4-STAGE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: After normal finalization, sp.stage shall equal a4 and history_of_stages shall receive a4.
    GHOST-A4-EXTRAS
    14.6. A4 Diagnostics
    UID: GHOST-A4-EXTRAS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: A4 extras shall record budget profile, active classes, retained groups, and effective output-token limit.
    GHOST-A4-PROMPT-READY
    14.7. A4 Prompt Reprojection
    UID: GHOST-A4-PROMPT-READY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: A4 finalization shall attempt to rebuild prompt_ready through SuperPrompt.compose_prompt_ready.
    GHOST-A4-PROJECTOR
    14.8. Condensed Evidence Rendering
    UID: GHOST-A4-PROJECTOR
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: After A4, the central projector shall render S_CTX_MD as Retrieved Project Evidence Summary under Supporting Context and shall hide raw document chunks from the normal preview.
    GHOST-A4-NO-MEMORY
    14.9. A4 Memory Boundary
    UID: GHOST-A4-NO-MEMORY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-NO-MEMORY AC: Document-Only Evidence
    STATEMENT: A4 shall not read or condense raw memory candidates, MemoryContextPack, or synthesized memory context.
    GHOST-A4-NO-FINAL-ANSWER
    14.10. A4 Final-Answer Boundary
    UID: GHOST-A4-NO-FINAL-ANSWER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-ROOT A4 Document Evidence Condenser
    STATEMENT: A4 completion shall not constitute final user-answer generation.

    15. 15. Configuration, Error Handling, Traceability, and Acceptance

    STATEMENT: A3/A4 operational limits and model selections shall migrate to JSON while current exact behavior remains traceable.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-JSON
    15.1. Evidence Configuration Target
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-JSON
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-FIELDS Evidence Configuration Fields
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-BASELINE Current Evidence Defaults
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-RUNTIME-MISMATCH Runtime-Config Wiring Truth
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-CONFIG AC: JSON Parameter Migration
    STATEMENT: A3/A4 operational tuning parameters shall be migrated to versioned JSON runtime configuration.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-FIELDS
    15.2. Evidence Configuration Fields
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-FIELDS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-JSON Evidence Configuration Target
    STATEMENT: The configuration target shall include A3 candidate cap, useful maximum, A3 agent version, A3 model/token settings, A4 candidate cap, A4 output allowance, A4 budget thresholds, A4 agent versions, prompt cache key, and optional-stage enablement.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-BASELINE
    15.3. Current Evidence Defaults
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-BASELINE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-JSON Evidence Configuration Target
    STATEMENT: Until migration is complete, current constructor and deterministic baselines shall remain observable, including A3 max_candidates 30, A3 useful_hard_max 12, A4 max_candidates 30, A4 default output allowance 3000, and the implemented A4 budget thresholds.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-RUNTIME-MISMATCH
    15.4. Runtime-Config Wiring Truth
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-RUNTIME-MISMATCH
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-JSON Evidence Configuration Target
    STATEMENT: A runtime_config value such as max_document_chunks_for_a3 or a4_condenser.max_output_tokens shall not be described as enforced unless controller/component construction or call arguments actually consume it.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-NO-FABRICATION
    15.5. No Fabricated Evidence Result
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-NO-FABRICATION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    STATEMENT: A3/A4 provider failure, parse failure, missing configuration, invalid class output, or empty final context shall not be converted into invented successful evidence content.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-CODE-OWNERSHIP
    15.6. Evidence Code Ownership
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-CODE-OWNERSHIP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-SYNC AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
    STATEMENT: A3NLIGate, A4Condenser, A4 deterministic processing, A4LLMHelper, and their concrete JSON configurations shall map to the deepest applicable UIDs in this document.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-SIBLING
    15.7. Sibling Ownership Boundary
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-SIBLING
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-ROOT Evidence Selection and Condensation Scope
    STATEMENT: Retrieval/reranking scores and candidate generation shall remain owned by 42; memory filtering/synthesis shall remain outside this document.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A3-LABELS
    15.8. AC: A3 Labels
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A3-LABELS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-OUTPUT-LABELS A3 Allowed Labels
    STATEMENT: Given a valid A3 call, every processed candidate shall receive normalized useful, borderline, or discarded classification, with missing/invalid results represented as borderline.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A3-SELECT
    15.9. AC: A3 Useful-Only Selection
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A3-SELECT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-USEFUL-ONLY Useful-Only Final Selection
    STATEMENT: A3 final_selection_ids shall contain at most the configured maximum of useful candidates and shall contain no borderline or discarded identifier.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A3-ZERO
    15.10. AC: A3 Zero Useful
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A3-ZERO
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-ZERO-USEFUL Zero Useful Result
    STATEMENT: Given zero useful classifications, A3 shall complete with empty final_selection_ids and A4 shall complete through empty-selection safety without an LLM call.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-LOCAL-IDS
    15.11. AC: Local Identifier Isolation
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-LOCAL-IDS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A3-LOCAL-IDS A3 Local Identifier Mapping
    STATEMENT: A3 and A4 model-visible chunk identifiers shall be compact local identifiers and final stage artifacts shall map back to real stable chunk identifiers.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-CLASSES
    15.12. AC: A4 Active Classes
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-CLASSES
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-CLASS-COUNT Active Class Count
    STATEMENT: A valid phraser result shall yield one to four active classes using allowed internal IDs with non-empty phrase and context fields.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-GROUP
    15.13. AC: A4 Complete Grouping
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-GROUP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-GROUPS Class Group Construction
    STATEMENT: When every selected local chunk has a valid active-class assignment, A4 shall build non-empty priority-ordered groups and apply the effective budget profile.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-FALLBACK
    15.14. AC: A4 Fallback
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-FALLBACK
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-FALLBACK-CONTINUE Fallback Continuation
    STATEMENT: When classifier grouping is incomplete or unusable, A4 shall retain all selected chunks in original order, mark fallback_no_grouping, and continue to final condensation.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-CONTEXT
    15.15. AC: A4 Internal Context
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-CONTEXT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-INTERNAL-CONTEXT Internal Context Nature
    STATEMENT: A successful normal A4 run shall produce non-empty S_CTX_MD that is evidence-loyal internal context and shall not be a direct user answer.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-BUDGET
    15.16. AC: A4 Budget Profiles
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-A4-BUDGET
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-TOKEN-LIMIT Effective A4 Output Limit
    STATEMENT: For token limits below 1200, below 1800, below 2600, and at least 2600, the retained group counts and profile names shall match tight, narrow, medium, and broad rules respectively.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-NO-MEMORY
    15.17. AC: Document-Only Evidence
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-NO-MEMORY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-A4-NO-MEMORY A4 Memory Boundary
    STATEMENT: A3/A4 outputs shall be unchanged by the presence of raw memory candidates except through separately approved current-request/ActiveBrief input already projected before Knowledge Management.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-CONFIG
    15.18. AC: JSON Parameter Migration
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-CONFIG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CONFIG-JSON Evidence Configuration Target
    STATEMENT: After configuration migration, evidence-stage limits, thresholds, models, and agent versions shall change through validated JSON and shall be observable without hidden Python edits.
    GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-SYNC
    15.19. AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
    UID: GHOST-EVIDENCE-AC-SYNC
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-EVIDENCE-CODE-OWNERSHIP Evidence Code Ownership
    STATEMENT: An evidence-processing baseline shall not be accepted when A3 selection semantics, A4 sequence, class validation, fallback behavior, budget rules, S_CTX_MD meaning, or configuration authority contradicts this document.
    Built with StrictDoc 0.25.0
